Module me.stringdotjar.flixelgdx.core
Package me.stringdotjar.flixelgdx.graphics

Class FlixelGraphic

java.lang.Object
me.stringdotjar.flixelgdx.asset.FlixelTypedAsset<com.badlogic.gdx.graphics.Texture>
me.stringdotjar.flixelgdx.graphics.FlixelGraphic
All Implemented Interfaces:
FlixelAsset<com.badlogic.gdx.graphics.Texture>, FlixelPooledWrapper
public final class FlixelGraphic extends FlixelTypedAsset<com.badlogic.gdx.graphics.Texture> implements FlixelPooledWrapper
Graphic container and wrapper around a libGDX Texture, implementing FlixelAsset<Texture> via FlixelTypedAsset.

Graphics are identified by an assetKey (usually an internal asset path). Wrapper instances are pooled in FlixelAssetManager so multiple sprites can share policy state.

Lifecycle (persist, refcount) is tracked here; keyed texture loading is implemented in FlixelAssetManager (Flixel.assets).

Enqueue loads with queueLoad() (or FlixelAssetManager.load(FlixelSource) / FlixelAssetManager.load(String) on Flixel.assets); prefer FlixelAssetManager.load(FlixelSource) over load(String) when the type must be explicit.

See Also:
  • FlixelAssetManager

    • isOwned

      public boolean isOwned()
      Whether this graphic wraps a pixmap-generated texture (disposed on clear, not unloaded by key).
      Specified by:
      isOwned in interface FlixelPooledWrapper
      Returns:
      true if the wrapper is owned, false otherwise.

      @Nullable public @Nullable com.badlogic.gdx.graphics.Texture getOwnedTexture()

    • queueLoad

      public void queueLoad()
      Description copied from interface: FlixelAsset
      Enqueues this asset into the active FlixelAssetManager. Safe to call multiple times.

      Use this method to preload assets in your game's loading state.

      Specified by:
      queueLoad in interface FlixelAsset<com.badlogic.gdx.graphics.Texture>
      Overrides:
      queueLoad in class FlixelTypedAsset<com.badlogic.gdx.graphics.Texture>

    • require

      @NotNull public @NotNull com.badlogic.gdx.graphics.Texture require()
      Returns the loaded texture. Strict: the texture must already be loaded (typically via queueLoad() plus FlixelAssetManager.update() in a loading state).
      Specified by:
      require in interface FlixelAsset<com.badlogic.gdx.graphics.Texture>
      Overrides:
      require in class FlixelTypedAsset<com.badlogic.gdx.graphics.Texture>
      Returns:
      The loaded asset.

    • requireTexture

      @NotNull public @NotNull com.badlogic.gdx.graphics.Texture requireTexture()
      Same as require(); kept for call sites that name the texture explicitly.

    • loadNow

      @NotNull public @NotNull com.badlogic.gdx.graphics.Texture loadNow()
      Explicit synchronous load for one-off cases if the texture is not loaded yet.

      Prefer queueLoad() in a loading state to avoid blocking the main thread.

      Specified by:
      loadNow in interface FlixelAsset<com.badlogic.gdx.graphics.Texture>
      Overrides:
      loadNow in class FlixelTypedAsset<com.badlogic.gdx.graphics.Texture>
